cases.prompt: Mobile home parcels in Mount Vernon, including mobile home parks and mobile homes on owned or leased land.

failures.message: R2SearchError: DuckDB execution failed: Binder Error: Values list "ps" does not have a column named "year_built"

action_plan: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.next_action: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH mh_land_use_codes AS (
  SELECT '150' AS code UNION ALL
  SELECT '180' UNION ALL
  SELECT '181' UNION ALL
  SELECT '182' UNION ALL
  SELECT '185'
),
ps AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet')
  WHERE (
    lower(city_name) = 'mount vernon'
    OR lower(situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%mount vernon%'
  )
  AND (
    regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN (SELECT code FROM mh_land_use_codes)
  )
)
SELECT
  ps.parcel_number,
  ps.owner_name,
  ps.situs_address,
  ps.situs_city_state_zip,
  ps.land_use,
  ps.acres,
  ps.assessed_value,
  ps.year_built,
  ps.improvement_building_count,
  ps.total_improvement_value,
  ps.total_living_area,
  ps.largest_building_living_area,
  ps.primary_building_style,
  ps.primary_actual_year_built,
  ps.primary_effective_year_built,
  ps.primary_building_improvement_value,
  'Mobile home land use code match' AS match_reasons
FROM ps
ORDER BY ps.parcel_number
cases.title: Mobile Home Parcels in Mount Vernon Including Parks and Owned/Leased Land
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Mount Vernon city or with situs city state zip containing 'mount vernon' having land use codes for mobile homes (180, 181, 182, 185) or mobile home parks (150). Includes parcels with mobile home improvements. Returns parcel details with match reasons.
